query:
SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  pt.receipt_no,
  pt.paid_at,
  pt.amount AS pt_amount,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS principal_paid,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS interest_paid,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS fee_paid,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS penalty_paid,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS unlock_fee_paid,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS discount_amount,
  (pt.amount - (
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) -
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0)
  )) AS diff
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON c.id = pt.contract_id
WHERE ABS(pt.amount - (
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) -
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0)
)) > 0.01
ORDER BY ABS(pt.amount - (
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) -
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0)
)) DESC
LIMIT 10;

    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
